SELECT hbl_contract.hbl_contractid, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_name, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_opportunityid, hbl_contract.mc_contract_assigneeid, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_contract_drive, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_invoices_drive, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_start_date, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_end_date, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_action_date, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_interactions, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_invoice_interaction, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_jan, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_feb, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_mar, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_apr, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_may, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_jun, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_jul, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_aug, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_sep, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_oct, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_nov, hbl_contract.hbl_contract_dec, hbl_contract.createdon, hbl_contract.modifiedon, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_name AS hbl_opportunities__hbl_opportunities_name, hbl_account.hbl_account_name AS hbl_account__hbl_account_name 
FROM hbl_contract LEFT OUTER JOIN hbl_opportunities ON hbl_contract.hbl_contract_opportunityid = hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunitiesid LEFT OUTER JOIN hbl_account ON hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_accountid = hbl_account.hbl_accountid 
WHERE hbl_account.hbl_account_name = :hbl_account_name_1
 LIMIT :param_1
